response.original_title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge? Easy Ways to Get Your Money Back
response.overview: Yes absolutely, you can dispute a charge from Priceline. TFN ☎️ +1✺888✺423✺4029 First contact their support team to request a refund or correction. 🤙✈️ US +(1_(888)-->423→4029) or 🤙✈️UK +(44_(203)-->836→5747)  (OTA) If they don’t resolve it, you can file a dispute or chargeback through your bank or credit card provider.
response.title: Can I Dispute a Priceline Charge? Easy Ways to Get Your Money Back
